problem id: 6218204f
category: bit_manipulation

rule: ROT(5) AND NOT SHL(6)

examples:
  11001010 -> 01011001
  00100111 -> 00100100
  01111001 -> 00101111
  11011111 -> 00111011
  10101111 -> 00110101
  10101110 -> 01010101
  00001000 -> 00000001
  00010001 -> 00100010
  00101110 -> 01000101
  10111100 -> 10010111

query: 10110001
predicted answer: 00110110
